summary: Tested all 5 requested features for Strava for Surfing app feed improvements. All features working correctly: CreatePostModal scrolling, Create page with carousel/session conditions, Who Reacted modal, and like count positioning.
critical_code_review_comments: CreatePostModal.js (lines 352-368): Modal has max-h-[90vh] flex flex-col with overflow-y-auto on content area - scrolling works correctly
CreatePost.js: Complete rewrite with carousel support (up to 10 photos), session conditions, and same features as CreatePostModal
PostCard.js (lines 467-490): WhoReacted handlers with 500ms long-press threshold working correctly
PostCard.js (lines 647-660): Like count displayed next to shaka icon (same row, gap-1.5) - Instagram style layout
WhoReactedModal.js: New modal component showing reactors with avatars, names, roles, and emojis
Backend posts.py (lines 46-51): ReactionData includes avatar_url and user_role fields

test_credentials.note: User has free tier subscription enabled

seed_data_creation: None - used existing user and posts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) CreatePostModal scrolls correctly with session conditions expanded, 2) Create page (/create) has 'Up to 10 photos' carousel and session conditions support, 3) Who Reacted modal opens on 500ms long-press of like count showing user avatars/names/roles/emojis, 4) Like count displays next to shaka icon (same row) not underneath post.

createPostModal_scrolling.notes: Modal has max-h-[90vh] with overflow-y-auto. Session conditions expand and modal scrolls correctly within viewport.

create_page_carousel.notes: Create page (/create) shows 'Up to 10 photos or 1 video' text, Photo/Video buttons, and matches CreatePostModal features.

create_page_session_conditions.notes: CreatePost.js has 'Add Session Conditions' button (lines 617-631) that expands to show wave/wind/tide fields. Button appears after media selection.

who_reacted_modal.notes: Long-press (500ms+) on like count opens 'Reactions' modal showing user avatars, names, roles, and reaction emojis.

like_count_position.notes: Like count displays NEXT TO shaka icon (same row, Y diff 4px) - Instagram style layout. NOT underneath the post.

createPostModal_elements: 'Select up to 10 photos for a carousel post' text
session_conditions_fields: Wave Height (ft), Period (sec), Wave Dir fields
who_reacted_modal_elements: Click to navigate to user profile
